display.purpose: The hero headline only — one per site, not per page.

label.purpose: Eyebrow / TOC heading; once per page at most.

mono.purpose: Commands, keys, paths — everything the machine says.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Only on elements that genuinely float: the sticky header and the opened mobile menu. Cards stay flat.

motion.name: state-shift
motion.purpose: Hover and theme transitions; never transforms or layout properties. prefers-reduced-motion collapses to ~instant.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary CTA per view; white on Harness Green.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #15803d; color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #14532d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #15803d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action; ink text with a strong hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #15803d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square labeled icon control (theme toggle, mobile menu).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-icon" aria-label="Toggle color theme"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.4rem; height: 2.4rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: transparent; color: #475569; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-icon:hover { color: #0f172a; background: #f1f5f9; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-btn-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #15803d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link (active)
components.description: Top-nav item; the current page holds a green-tint pill.
components.html: IntroductionGetting StartedConfiguration
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-link { color: #475569; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.925rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #0f172a; background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-nav-link[aria-current="page"] { color: #15803d; background: #dcfce7; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #15803d; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Flat bordered card opening with a green-tint icon chip. No shadow (The Float Rule).
components.html:
Rule engines

Real hooks that intercept edits in flight and push the agent back on-spec.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.5rem; max-width: 22rem; font-family: inherit; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 650; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #475569; } .ds-card-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.6rem; height: 2.6rem; border-radius: 10px; background: #dcfce7; color: #14532d; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

components.name: Info Callout
components.description: Tinted advisory block with inline SVG icon; never a side-stripe.
components.html: Settings edited in the web UI take effect immediately.
components.css: .ds-callout { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem 1.15rem; font-size: 0.925rem; background: #dcfce7; color: #14532d; max-width: 32rem; } .ds-callout svg { flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.15rem; } .ds-callout p { margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: The Machine Voice: ink-dark panel, mono, self-contained horizontal scroll.
components.html:
.venv/bin/python cli/regin.py serve
# Open http://localhost:8321 and log in
components.css: .ds-code { background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; overflow-x: auto; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 34rem; margin: 0; }

components.name: Beta Pill
components.description: Maturity honesty as a brand element, worn next to the logo.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #dcfce7; color: #14532d; }

narrative.overview: A well-thumbed engineer's handbook: structured, legible, and generous with explanation. The warmth in this system comes from craft and clarity — plain language, patient pacing, real screenshots of the working tool — never from ornament, gradients, or trend styling. Pages read like a knowledgeable colleague walking you through a sharp idea, one section at a time, with the diagram already drawn. The system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS landing, AI-hype maximalism, and cold dev-tool austerity. It is light-first with a full dark theme, flat with hairline borders, and spends its single accent — Harness Green — only where the mechanism speaks.
keyCharacteristics: One typeface (Inter) in many weights; JetBrains Mono for everything the machine says
One accent color with a strict budget; slate neutrals do all other work
Flat surfaces separated by 1px hairlines; shadow only on things that float
Measured accessibility: every text/background pair verified ≥4.5:1 in both themes
Dark mode is a first-class palette, not an inversion

rules.name: The Green Budget Rule
rules.body: Harness Green appears only where the mechanism speaks: links, active nav, one primary CTA per view, focus rings. If green exceeds ~10% of a screen, something is misusing it.

rules.name: The Measured Pair Rule
rules.body: No color pair ships on trust. Every foreground/background combination is computed against WCAG AA (≥4.5:1 text, ≥3:1 non-text) in both themes before it lands.

rules.name: The 72ch Rule
rules.body: Article prose never exceeds a 72-character measure, whatever the viewport.

rules.name: The Machine Voice Rule
rules.body: Anything the user would type or the system would emit — commands, keys, paths, values — is set in mono, always. Prose never wears mono for emphasis.

rules.name: The Float Rule
rules.body: If it doesn't physically overlay other content, it doesn't get a shadow. Cards are flat.

dos: Do hold every new color pair to The Measured Pair Rule — compute the ratio (≥4.5:1 text, ≥3:1 non-text) in both themes before shipping.
Do keep Harness Green scarce (The Green Budget Rule): links, active state, one CTA, focus ring — nothing else.
Do use real product screenshots as imagery; the working tool is the proof.
Do contain overflow locally: code blocks and tables scroll inside their own containers; scrollWidth ≤ clientWidth holds on the page at every viewport.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with a near-instant alternative for every transition.
Do keep icon-only buttons labeled (aria-label) and all icons as inline SVG.
donts: Don't build the "generic SaaS landing": no gradient hero, no floating dashboard mockups, no logo marquee, no pricing-table energy.
Don't ship "AI-hype maximalism": no glowing gradients, no particle backgrounds, no sparkle iconography, no "revolutionary agentic AI" copy.
Don't drift back into "cold dev-tool austerity": light-first, generous line-height (1.65), patient explanatory copy — the dark theme is an option, not the identity.
Don't use emoji as icons, gradient text, glassmorphism, colored side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px), or a tracked-uppercase eyebrow above every section — one Label per page, maximum.
Don't put shadows on cards or transforms on hovers; if it looks lifted or it moves on hover, it's off-system.
Don't set prose in mono or let any text pair fall below 4.5:1 — "light gray for elegance" is prohibited.
